_comment: Failure runbook for the self-improvement loop. Based on Meta REA patterns.

yaml_parse_error.description: Modified workflow file failed YAML parse — never deploy

circuit_breaker_removed.description: Safety violation — circuit breakers must never be removed

score_regression.description: Success rate dropped >10% after last modification

three_consecutive_no_improvement.description: Three nights without improvement — stability phase

target_file_not_found.description: Meta-agent proposed modifying a file that doesn't exist

before_text_not_found.description: The 'before' text was not found in target file — stale or hallucinated
